creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: eadler
Date: Sun Sep  2 18:40:17 2012
New Revision: 240053
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/240053

Log:
  MFC r235251,r238205:
  
  	Add Spanish Dvorak keyboard model to syscons.
  
  	(not verified to be accurate)
  
  PR:		conf/160235
  Approved by:	cperciva (implicit)

Modified:
  stable/9/share/syscons/keymaps/INDEX.keymaps
Directory Properties:
  stable/9/share/syscons/keymaps/   (props changed)

Modified: stable/9/share/syscons/keymaps/INDEX.keymaps
==============================================================================
--- stable/9/share/syscons/keymaps/INDEX.keymaps	Sun Sep  2 18:40:14 2012	(r240052)
+++ stable/9/share/syscons/keymaps/INDEX.keymaps	Sun Sep  2 18:40:17 2012	(r240053)
@@ -378,6 +378,8 @@ ru.koi8-r.win.kbd:pt:Russo koi8-r (winke
 ru.koi8-r.win.kbd:es:Ruso koi8-r (winkeys)
 ru.koi8-r.win.kbd:uk:òÏÓ¦ÊÓØËÁ koi8-r (winkeys)
 
+spanish.dvorak.kbd:en:Spanish Dvorak
+
 spanish.iso.kbd:en:Spanish ISO-8859-1
